name: io.github.ctxstore-ai/ctxstore-mcp
description: Persistent AI memory via MCP. Give your AI agent long-term memory across sessions — semantic search over conversations, facts, and decisions. Free, no signup required.

TENANT_API_KEY.description: Your ctxstore.ai API key. Auto-provisioned on first run — leave blank to get a free key automatically.
Your ctxstore.ai API key. Auto-provisioned on first run — leave blank to get a free key automatically.

tools.name: search_context
tools.description: Search memory — all ingested conversations and sessions. Returns semantically relevant context with temporal weighting.

tools.name: search_facts
tools.description: Search extracted facts, preferences, and decisions by category.

tools.name: store_fact
tools.description: Store a new fact for permanent retention across sessions.

tools.name: delete_fact
tools.description: Delete a stored fact by its ID.

tools.name: get_stats
tools.description: Get statistics about your context store — total vectors, collection sizes, usage vs plan limits.
